name: drift
source: kit self-check (the kit watching its own decay)
trigger: weekly per-installed-repo self-check, files ONLY on a failing or stale condition: doctor.sh FAIL, baseline older than 30 days, governor stamp older than 30 days (RAILS_DRIFT_STALE_DAYS), or unlinked incidents. Dedup per condition per ISO week.
env_doc: No credential: drift reads only the local repo.
